/usr/bin/ar qc libcore_static.a CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/bus_matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/cpu_state.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/dma.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/execute.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/i2c.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/nvic.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/nvic_extended.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/rcc.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/spi.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/tim6.c.o CMakeFiles/core_static.dir/core/src/usart.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcore_static.a
